message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for DataFrame.replace (2 cases)

Append 2 live-pandas oracle tests covering DataFrame.replace with
parallel find/value lists:

- replace_int_to_int: 2-col int frame, replace [1,2] -> [100,200]
  across both columns
- replace_str_to_str: 2-col utf8 frame, replace "old" -> "new"
  across both columns

Each test queries the live legacy-pandas oracle (which calls
frame.replace(find_list, value_list)), runs the Rust DataFrame.replace
(&[(Scalar, Scalar), ...]), and asserts parity via
compare_dataframe_expected. DataFrameReplace was already wired through
the Frame response branch; this fills the live-oracle test gap.

[bd-frankenpandas-88dzi]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
